position: Adobe Commerce / Magento Senior Full-stack Developer (Front-end Focus) | Infracommerce
description:
Responsible for the development, maintenance, and evolution of complex, high-performance digital ecosystems for the LatAm market. Strategically integrated into multiple squads, ensuring scalability and stability for critical e-commerce operations.

Regional Impact (LatAm): Development and technical support for major international players across Peru, Argentina, Chile, and Colombia.

Results & Go-Lives: Directly contributed to 13 successful Go-Lives, ensuring seamless transitions of high-stakes projects into production environments.

Brand Portfolio: Technical support and evolution for over 27 brands, featuring market leaders such as:
Food Service: Dunkin', Papa John's, Popeyes, Bembos, China Wok, Don Belisario, and Melt Pizzas.

Retail, Tech & Appliances: Rosen (CL/PE), Cetrogar, Efe, Casa del Audio, Hendel, Promelsa, and Ceven.

Fashion & Lifestyle: Paruolo, Ver, Devre, Grisino, Broer, Crisol, LikeMe, and Cannon Home.

High-Demand Management: Actively operating across multiple squads, successfully managing a portfolio of 18+ active brands.

Quality-First Culture: Strict focus on task evidence, technical documentation, and precise time-tracking. Proven track record of zero release delays.

Versatility & Resilience: Full-stack expertise with full availability for critical support periods and high-traffic events (weekends and holidays).
